title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Network Stakeholder Mission
summary: A nonprofit opening a fifty-user branch office. Staff, voice, guests, management, printers, and growth need documented routed and switched connectivity. Planned artifact: Deliver Addressed and Segmented Branch Network with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Document scopes, gateways, reservations, exclusions, VLANs, DHCP pools, static infrastructure, and IPAM ownership.
Read connected, static, dynamic, default, and host routes and select the longest matching destination prefix.
Create VLANs and assign access interfaces while matching documentation, endpoint purpose, and broadcast-domain boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
